get.description: Returns OK when the server is running
Returns whether a memory plugin is bound and which one.
Queries a namespace for resources matching the given query.

post.description: Persists a resource into the given namespace.
Appends a user message to the given session and streams the pipeline response as NDJSON. Each line is a WireEvent JSON object.

200.description: NDJSON stream; one event per line

post.description: Returns the assembled system prompt and chat-message slice that would be sent to the provider, without persisting the new user message or calling the LLM. Use to debug prompt composition.

get.description: Returns info for all loaded plugin drivers
Returns info for a single plugin driver by name
Returns the capability set advertised by a plugin driver
Returns names of all loaded provider plugins
Returns all models from every provider alongside locally configured model templates
Returns info for a single provider plugin by name
Returns all models available from a provider
Returns info for a single model from a provider
Returns all sessions, optionally filtered by parent ID

patch.description: Summarizes the session history into a compressed context message (not yet implemented)

get.description: Returns metadata for a single session by ID or name

delete.description: Deletes a session and all its messages

get.description: Returns messages for a session in chronological order

patch.description: Removes intermediate tool call and tool result messages to reduce context size

get.description: Returns a single message by ID
Returns definitions for all registered tools across all namespaces
Returns definitions for all tools in the given namespace
Returns the definition for a single tool by namespace and name

post.description: Executes a tool by namespace and name with the provided arguments
Executes a tool by namespace and name, associating the result with the given call ID
